credRef.title: Credential Reference
credRef.description: Reference to an external Credential, resolved at runtime through the Secret Store

credId.description: Identifier of the referenced Credential entry

property.description: Optional property name to read from a multi-field Credential

cp_discovery.title: Cloud Passport Discovery Configuration
cp_discovery.description: Configuration settings related to Cloud Passport discovery

branch.title: Branch Name
branch.description: The name of the GitLab branch to be used

project.title: Project Name
project.description: The GitLab project name or ID

token.title: Access Token
token.description: The access token granting the access to discovery repository for calling Cloud Passport discovery. Accepts a plain string or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential

self_token.title: Self Token
self_token.description: The access token granting the access to this repository for committing changes. Accepts a plain string or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential

docker_registry_auth.title: Docker Registry Auth
docker_registry_auth.description: Authentication credential for the Docker registry that EnvGene reads. Accepts a plain string or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential. Falls back to the `GCP_SA_KEY` CI/CD variable when absent
